case_title: BANK OF THE WEST VS. AUSTIN DRYCLEANERS & LAUNDROMAT et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF COPIES MADE AS BUSINESS RECORD ( EVID CODE 1521, 1550 ) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST

CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AUSTIN DRYCLEANERS & LAUNDROMAT INC. BLOM, TARA POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: ONE SANKOSHA SUN-MASTER CF-567 SINGLE BUCK SHIRT PRESS, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $20,980.05 DAMAGES, $2,425.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $390.00 COSTS, $350.75 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $24,145.80, SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH RE: LEASED EQUIPMENT, PROPERTY VALUE $ 15,000.00 SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST AS TO DEFENDANT AUSTIN DRYCLEANERS & LAUNDROMAT INC. BLOM, TARA DOES 1 THRU 10, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR APR-18-2008 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-16-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         APR-03-2008
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST SERVED DEC-26-2007, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT AUSTIN DRYCLEANERS & LAUNDROMAT INC.
DECLARATION OF DOUGLAS HOLLOWAY IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, AS TO DEFENDANT AUSTIN DRYCLEANERS & LAUNDROMAT INC. BLOM, TARA
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST SERVED DEC-26-2007, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BLOM, TARA
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT ( EQUIPMENT VALUATION ) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $390.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT AUSTIN DRYCLEANERS & LAUNDROMAT INC. BLOM, TARA
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THRU 10, INCL.
